package rulecoverage

func NegativeDeferInTightLoop() string {
    ruleID := "defer_in_tight_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`defer` statements inside loops with > 100 iterations or visible hot-path markers"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
